div.h3: Internal Architecture for Deferred ECS Mutations

p.em: Specification: Intel Manual Quality - Byte Layout & Dispatch Sequence

ol.li: Lock World: Acquire Exclusive Write Lock.
Phase 1: IDs: Map pre-allocated Entity IDs to live World index.

Phase 2: Structural: Batch process Insert and Remove.
Note: Triggers Archetype graph transitions.
Phase 3: Cleanup: Execute Destroy. Free component storage.
Clear Buffer: Reset Vec length to 0 (Retain capacity).

ul.li: 🟢 Spawned: Immediate ID, Deferred World insert
